creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
Looking at one of my ports, I was surprised to see that
	current portlint does not warn about USE_GMAKE and suggests
	to replace it by USES=gmake.

	In fact, after I updated my port to use that new format,
	portlint now serves me a warning:
WARN: Makefile: [32]: possible direct use of command "gmake" found. use ${GMAKE} instead.

How-To-Repeat: 	For the false negative (failure to warn about USE_GMAKE):
	% cd $PORTSDIR/lang/gcc34
	% portlint -C

	For the false positive (incorrect warning to use ${GMAKE} in USES=):
	% cd $PORTSDIR/lang/gcc48
	% portlint -C
